title: 7th Strategic Energy Plan
issuing_body: METI / Agency for Natural Resources and Energy (ANRE)
evidence_note: Cabinet-approved 18 Feb 2025; FY2040 mix ~40-50% renewables, ~20% nuclear, 30-40% thermal.

title: GX2040 Vision
evidence_note: Cabinet-approved 18 Feb 2025; carbon pricing, GX-ETS, ~JPY20tn transition bonds.

title: GX-ETS / GX League
evidence_note: Full-scale GX-ETS from FY2026; fossil-fuel surcharge in later years.

title: Cross-regional Grid Master Plan
evidence_note: Multi-trillion-yen transmission build incl. Hokkaido-Honshu HVDC.

title: Hydrogen Society Promotion Act
evidence_note: Low-carbon hydrogen price-gap (CfD-style) support; applications FY2024-25.

title: CCS Business Act
evidence_note: Enacted 2024; advanced CCS projects selected; commercial CCS target 2030.

title: Economic Security Promotion Act (ESPA)
evidence_note: Specified critical products: semis, batteries, minerals, cloud, ship parts; ~JPY72.5bn cloud/AI compute approved.

title: Foreign Exchange and Foreign Trade Act (FEFTA) / export controls
evidence_note: FDI screening and dual-use export controls; tightened around advanced tech.

title: Defense Buildup Program
evidence_note: Five-year JPY43tn program FY2023-27; stand-off, IAMD, unmanned, space, cyber.

title: FY2026 Defense Budget / Progress in Fundamental Reinforcement
evidence_note: Record budget; defense spending toward ~2% of GDP; expanded unmanned and long-range munitions.

title: Defense Production Base Strengthening Act
evidence_note: Support for production-base reinforcement and equipment transfer.

title: Rapidus 2nm funding / METI support
evidence_note: FY2025 subsidies ~JPY802.5bn; additional JPY631.5bn approved Apr 2026; cumulative state support trending toward ~JPY2.9tn; 2nm mass-production target 2027, FY2031 IPO target.

title: Semiconductor & Digital Industry Strategy / Post-5G program
evidence_note: Leading-edge logic, power/analog, materials, equipment, advanced packaging support.

title: Industrial Competitiveness Enhancement Act (revised)
evidence_note: Production-linked support for semis, EVs, green steel, SAF; mid-sized-enterprise support.

title: Domestic cloud / AI-compute support (ESPA) + Information Processing Act
evidence_note: ~JPY72.5bn approved for cloud programs / AI compute; 2025 information-processing law.

title: Digital Agency policy dashboards & priority plan
evidence_note: Policy Dashboard, Japan Dashboard, Digital Marketplace, Technology Map Portal; Government AI (GENAI).

title: Government Cloud
evidence_note: National/local migration to Government Cloud; DXSaaS certification for local governments.

title: Cashless payment ratio statistics & roadmap
evidence_note: 2025 cashless ratio 58.0%; interim 65% by 2030; long-term 80%.

title: New NISA
evidence_note: Permanent tax-free investing from Jan 2024; ~24.3mn accounts (Jun 2024); ~JPY15tn net fund inflows in 2024.

title: Policy Plan for Promoting Japan as a Leading Asset Management Center
evidence_note: Asset-management upgrade, emerging-managers program, global-manager attraction.

title: Asset Owner Principles
evidence_note: Finalized 2024; governance and investment-outcome principles for asset owners.

title: Action to Implement Management that is Conscious of Cost of Capital and Stock Price
evidence_note: March 2023 request; monthly list of disclosing companies; drives buybacks and ROE focus.

title: Corporate Governance Code & Stewardship Code
evidence_note: Stewardship Code revised June 2025; CG Code revision panel active 2025-2026.

title: Monetary Policy Normalization
evidence_note: Exit from negative rates and YCC; ongoing normalization affects banks, insurers, real estate.

title: JGB Issuance Plan & Debt Management
evidence_note: FY2026 issuance plan; debt-management dialogue as rates normalize.

title: JPX Prime 150 & market segmentation
evidence_note: Index reform, segmentation and disclosure lists shaping passive flows.

title: Minimum Wage Council decision
evidence_note: FY2025 weighted-average minimum wage JPY1,121 (+6.26%); government target toward JPY1,500.

title: New Capitalism Grand Design / labor-saving investment plan
evidence_note: Wage-led growth; labor-saving investment promotion across services, logistics, care, agriculture.

title: Annual-income barrier / social-insurance reform
evidence_note: JPY1.06mn requirement scheduled for abolition within 3 years from Jun 2025.

title: Children's Future Strategy (Kodomo Mirai Senryaku)
evidence_note: ~JPY3.6tn package: child allowance, childcare, parental-leave benefits.

title: Kodomo Dare Demo Tsuen (flexible childcare)
evidence_note: Time-based childcare regardless of employment; nationwide benefit from FY2026.

title: Work-Style Reform / overtime caps (2024 problem)
evidence_note: Overtime caps from Apr 2024 on construction, drivers, doctors.

title: Logistics 2024 Problem / standard freight rates
evidence_note: Driver overtime caps plus standard freight rates, shipper responsibility, modal shift.

title: i-Construction 2.0
evidence_note: Construction-site automation, remote operation, 3D data adopted 2024.

title: FY2026 Medical Fee Revision (Shinryo Hoshu Kaitei)
evidence_note: FY2026 revision adopted early 2026: fees raised for wages/inflation; drug prices cut.

title: Drug Price Revision
evidence_note: Annual + periodic drug-price cuts; FY2026 cut ~0.8%; cost-effectiveness (HTA) expansion.

title: Healthcare DX roadmap
evidence_note: Three pillars: nationwide platform, EMR standardization, reimbursement DX; e-prescriptions.

title: National Resilience (Kokudo Kyojinka) implementation plan
evidence_note: Multi-year disaster-prevention and climate-adaptation public works.

title: Infrastructure maintenance / 5-year inspection rule
evidence_note: Mandatory 5-year bridge/tunnel inspections; ~half of bridges 50+ years within 10 years.

title: Tourism Nation Promotion Basic Plan
evidence_note: FY2026-30 plan; 2030 targets of 60mn visitors and JPY15tn spend; overtourism measures in 100 areas.

title: Inbound visitor & spending statistics
evidence_note: Record 42.7mn visitors in 2025; JPY9.5tn spend.

title: Basic Act for Food, Agriculture & Rural Areas (revised) + 2025 Basic Plan
evidence_note: Food security at center; paddy-policy review from FY2027; 2030 export target JPY5tn.

title: Smart Agriculture promotion
evidence_note: Autonomous machinery, drones, sensors and farm-management software.

title: MIDORI Strategy for Sustainable Food Systems
evidence_note: 2050: organic 1mn ha (25%), -50% risk-weighted pesticide, -30% chemical fertilizer; +30% food-mfg productivity by 2030.

title: Plastic Resource Circulation Act
evidence_note: In force since Apr 2022; design, collection and recycling obligations.

title: Circular Economy / Resource Autonomy Strategy
evidence_note: Domestic circular-economy market: ~JPY50tn (2020) -> JPY80tn (2030) -> JPY120tn (2050).
